summary: Iteration 195: Sales Commission Dashboard + Affiliate Dashboard + Margin Engine testing. Backend: 12/12 tests pass. Frontend: Sales Commission Dashboard works correctly. Affiliate Dashboard works after login. Staff sidebar config exists but staff pages use admin layout sidebar.

issues: Staff pages (/staff/*) use AdminLayout sidebar, not a dedicated staff sidebar. The staff-sidebar-links.js config file exists with 4 items (Dashboard, Orders, Customers, Earnings) but is only used in NavigationAuditPage, not in actual staff pages.

critical_code_review_comments: Staff sidebar config (staff-sidebar-links.js) is defined but not used in staff pages - staff pages use AdminLayout sidebar instead
test_credentials: Admin: admin@konekt.co.tz / KnktcKk_L-hw1wSyquvd!, Partner: demo.partner@konekt.com / Partner123!
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs pass. Sales Commission Dashboard at /staff/commission-dashboard works with 4 KPI cards (TZS prefix), Commission Per Order table, Monthly Earnings section, and How Commission Works section. Affiliate Dashboard at /partner/affiliate-dashboard works with 4 KPI cards, Products & Promotions table with Sell Price/You Earn/Customer Saves columns, Promo Code and Referral Link with Copy buttons. Partner sidebar shows simplified affiliate nav: Dashboard, Products & Promotions, Earnings, Payouts, Profile. The /api/affiliate/me endpoint now returns 200 (not 401) with empty data for non-affiliate users.

backend_commission_summary.evidence: Returns ok=true, summary with total_earned, pending_payout, paid_out, expected

backend_distribution_preview.evidence: With vendor_price=10000 and 40/30/30 split returns affiliate=400, sales=300, discount=300

frontend_sales_commission_dashboard.evidence: 4 KPI cards with TZS prefix, Commission Per Order section, Monthly Earnings section, How Commission Works section with 3 rules

frontend_affiliate_dashboard.evidence: 4 KPI cards with TZS prefix, Products & Promotions table with Sell Price/You Earn/Customer Saves columns, Promo Code and Referral Link with Copy buttons

frontend_affiliate_sidebar.evidence: Simplified nav: Dashboard, Products & Promotions, Earnings, Payouts, Profile (5 items)

frontend_staff_sidebar.evidence: Staff pages use AdminLayout sidebar. staff-sidebar-links.js config exists with 4 items but is not used in actual staff pages.
